asset_identified: The image shows a yellow PILZ safety gate input module

history.content: Can you help me troubleshoot this
The image shows a yellow PILZ safety gate input module. What seems to be the issue with it?
It won't read the RS ID puck when I put it against there. I've tried several pucks
You've tried multiple pucks, so it might not be the puck itself. Is the LED on the PILZ module indicating any error or status when you try to read the RS ID puck?
The LED not changing suggests a possible issue with the module's ability to detect the puck. Are you using the correct type of RS ID puck for this specific PILZ safety gate input module?
Yeah it worked yesterday. Is there a manual that would show me the pin out and everything for this?
You mentioned it worked yesterday, so something might have changed. Can you check the module's connections and wiring to ensure everything is secure and not damaged?
It all seems fine. What would I check for voltage and is it like a switch inside there? Do you have the manual for this?
You can check for voltage on the module's terminals. Does the manual specify which terminals to check for the RS ID puck reader function?
